title: Hyumtd's PVP
description: A unique texture pack that offers a cleaner experience compared to vanilla. Has re-textured the UI, Weapons & Blocks. Built for PVP server scenarios at the moment.
body:
# Hyumtd's PVP

### Features

- Ore Outlines
- Wool Outlines
- Re-Texture Apple/Golden Apple
- Custom Tools & Weapons
- Entire User-Interface Re-Texture
- Custom Hotbar & Crosshair
- Custom Breaking Animation

### Why Should You Use This Texture Pack?

- It's Good For PVP
- Better Visibility With The Re-Textured UI
- Offers A Much Cleaner Experience Than Vanilla

</details>



**_Do Not Re-Upload/Sell_**

_Made By: Hyumtd (Suprisingly)_
